title: Advanced Tower Defense Mod
description: A small mod that adds turrets and mechanisms that will greatly help in the defense of your fortress!
body:
(Updates may be delayed here since I have issues with accessing modrinth from my country)

Welcome to Advanced Tower Defense! Here you will find many interesting and funny things that will help you with the defense of your fortress. So far, the modification only has the Middle Ages, but in the future there will be other branches of technology development!

# -- Short guide on turrets --
How do I place a turret? - Take needed base (named in the description of the turret) and shift-click on the base. It should be deployed

How do I make my turret fire (AI base)? - Turret only attacking when they have enemy in radius and have winding mechanism in their base. Every turret has different radius. 

How do I make my turret fire (Manual base)? - Turret deployed on a manual controlled base are controlled by player keybord arrows and fires on binded button in settings.

Wanna see more guides? Here's my YT channel
[[Tap here]](https://www.youtube.com/@freon1038)


# -- FAQ --
q: Can I port your mod to other versions?

a: I want to stay at the 1.20, just porting mod is very hard (no, but thanks for asking)

---
q: Can I upload your mod somwhere else?

a: No, thanks

---
q: Will you add [something] in the mod?

a: For now I have some of my own ideas, I'll tell when I would need ideas, okay?

---
q: I found a bug! Where I can report it?

a: for now I don't have issue tracker, but I made a google form instead [[Tap here]](https://forms.gle/Wuo8BVMUFWhrodhE8)

---
q: Current ballance of weapons is unfair! What can I do?

a: If you have a wish to report balance changes, you can fill a form here :D [[Tap here]](https://forms.gle/CBrufQ43sFzuS7d79)

---
q: Can I make a mod overwiev?

a: Sure, but please, add a link to the source (this page)

---
q: What's the point of this mod?

a: Having fun, I hope my creation will bring some joy for the people who downloaded it

# -- Known issues --

"Turrets Keep firing at entities blocked by solid blocks, behind walls resulting in lots of ammo wasted." - Working on it, will be fixed in new update (new update is huge, so it would take some time ^^)

# -- Currently working on: --

Doin' some optimization and bug fixes, so that would take a bit, but I can say that update is a 70% done! yay!
I hope people reading that, lol

# -- From the author --

I created this mod for quite long and hard.. There were many failures and mistakes, but I was able to make something quite interesting. I hope this mod will find its audience and surprise Minecraft players with its new things. In addition, this is my first work, which I decided to bring to the finished state. I hope you like it, I will be grateful for warm words of support! :D

# -- Authors and contributors --
Freonsnowy (Me): code and texturing

OsmoKitty: texturing

Sayo Glimmer: texturing

Voxelstice: code
